error.signature: Tool results conflict — parallel tool calls create race condition

verdict.summary: LLM issues multiple tool calls in parallel that modify the same resource.

dead_ends.action: Execute all parallel tool calls concurrently as requested
dead_ends.why_fails: Concurrent execution of dependent tool calls causes race conditions

dead_ends.action: Ignore the parallel flag and run sequentially always
dead_ends.why_fails: Running everything sequentially defeats the performance benefit

workarounds.action: Detect resource dependencies and serialize conflicting tool calls
workarounds.how: Group tool calls by target resource; run independent groups in parallel

workarounds.action: Make tool implementations idempotent and conflict-safe
workarounds.how: Use optimistic locking or compare-and-swap patterns
